room.caption: [Vault Shifting Rooms A] Remember to breathe. And do it slowly, but not too slow.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" Look up to force the rooms to shift faster."
vaultString=" I've spent days within this. Lost, wondering how to get out."

GID_SET(257026, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}

GID_SET(257033, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}

GID_SET(257034, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}

GID_SET(257035, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}

GID_SET(257036, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}

GID_SET(257037, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_B} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_D}

GID_SET(257038, self.id) bShowArrow=true exitType=1 image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=8 newStep=5 newTrans=17 newMapX=640 newMapY=48 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_D} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_B}
stringToShow="Look up to force the rooms to shift faster." signSize=1
